tagline: Architect of Experiences. Master of Operations.
aboutSummary: Raja Abbas Khan leads the operational engine at E3, turning visionary ideas into high-footfall realities. Specializing in family entertainment and mega-events, he orchestrates complex venue logistics and guest experiences with precision.
careerJourney: Started as a field coordinator and rose through the ranks to lead some of the largest indoor activations in the region. He’s the backbone behind InflataCity and LEGO Shows Qatar.
keyStrengths: Flawless Execution under Pressure, Tactical Planning, Stakeholder Management

experienceTimeline.title: Events Director
experienceTimeline.description: Led operations for LEGO Shows Qatar 2024 at QNCC.

experienceTimeline.title: Senior Events Manager
experienceTimeline.description: Orchestrated InflataCity Qatar, managing multi-zone operations.

experienceTimeline.title: Senior Events Manager
experienceTimeline.description: Oversees the entire pipeline of E3's live activations and major attractions.

projectsPortfolio.description: Delivered a massive family entertainment event at QNCC with seamless guest flow and partner integration.
Engineered the daily operational flow for an indoor inflatable entertainment experience, ensuring safety and fun.

aboutSummary: Ahmad Faraz drives the digital pulse of E3. As a creative marketer, he builds high-impact campaigns that transform events into viral sensations, blending strategic vision with neon-infused digital storytelling.
careerJourney: Transitioned from a digital strategist to the driving creative force behind E3's top campaigns. He knows exactly how to hook an audience and keep them engaged from teaser to ticket purchase.
keyStrengths: Digital Strategy, Creative Direction, Audience Engagement

experienceTimeline.title: Marketing Manager
experienceTimeline.description: Designed the digital rollout for InflataCity and LEGO Shows.

experienceTimeline.title: Creative Marketing Lead
experienceTimeline.description: Spearheads all brand communications, promotional materials, and digital visibility for E3's immersive portfolio.

projectsPortfolio.description: Executed a viral digital campaign that achieved record-breaking early bird ticket sales.
Orchestrated the public communication strategy and artwork coordination for a high-profile IP.

tagline: Visionary Leadership. Transforming Entertainment in the MENA Region.
aboutSummary: As the visionary behind E3, Abdulla Al-Kuwari sets the strategic direction for immersive and family entertainment. His goal is to position Qatar as a global hub for interactive, gamified, and experiential activations.
careerJourney: With over 15 years in enterprise leadership and strategic investments, Abdulla founded E3 to bridge the gap between global entertainment IPs and the local market, spearheading partnerships with international brands.
keyStrengths: Strategic Vision, Corporate Partnerships, Regional Growth

experienceTimeline.title: Director of Investments
experienceTimeline.description: Managed high-value portfolios in lifestyle and entertainment sectors.

experienceTimeline.title: CEO & Founder
experienceTimeline.description: Leading the company's vision to dominate the experiential entertainment space.

projectsPortfolio.description: Successfully launched the brand, securing exclusive rights for top global IPs.
Spearheaded the investment and conceptualization of the next-gen gaming arena.

certifications: Executive Leadership Program - Harvard Business School
awards: MENA Entertainment Leader of the Year 2024

tagline: Crafting Immersive Realities. Blending Art with Play.
aboutSummary: Sarah Haddad bridges the gap between physical spaces and digital interaction. She is the creative mastermind behind E3's unique venue aesthetics, ensuring every attraction—from Crayons & Bricks to Urban Arena—feels intensely immersive.
careerJourney: Originally an architectural designer, Sarah pivoted into experiential entertainment, realizing her passion for creating spaces that people don't just see, but actively interact with.
keyStrengths: Spatial Design, Immersive Technology Integration, Artistic Direction

experienceTimeline.title: Lead Environment Designer
experienceTimeline.description: Designed award-winning escape rooms and VR arenas across the GCC.

experienceTimeline.title: Head of Experiential Design
experienceTimeline.description: Directs the visual and interactive layout for all E3 live activations.

projectsPortfolio.description: Conceptualized the neon, high-energy environment for the action-driven entertainment venue.
Designed a child-friendly, colorful, and tactile space maximizing creative engagement.
